must_detect.matched_text: Subject: preliminary cyber incident affecting ESG data room and DPT custody; F I E A-sensitive details regarding proposed acquisition of GreenArc K.K. (Project SUMIRE).
We will consider voluntary 報告 to the local exchange’s cyber desk within 24h, and assess whether a corrective press release is required if the tender schedule changes under FIEA Article 167 guidance.

Internal Incident Report — Kawatori Nexus K.K. — 2026-06-03 09:20 JST — Confidential (取締役会資料)
Subject: preliminary cyber incident affecting ESG data room and DPT custody; F I E A-sensitive details regarding proposed acquisition of GreenArc K.K. (Project SUMIRE).
On 2026-06-02 23:14 our SOC observed anomalous egress from bucket “esg-room-prj-sumire” and relay host “dpt-nx-4a7-**-**”; board materials and deal calendars were accessed.
Exfiltrated drafts include a sustainability-linked loan term sheet with 15bps margin step-up if Scope 2 > 28ktCO2e, and a slide proposing tender-offer window 07/22–08/05; these facts remain undisclosed to FDAEX and not public under FIEA.
We have expanded the insider list (内部者名簿) to six em ployees in Group Treasury and erected an information barrier (クリーンチーム/Chinese wall); a blackout window applies until remedial disclosure.
One HR CSV contained masked 個人番号 (e.g., ****-****-****) tied to three applicants; although redacted, under APPI (個人情報保護法) we are treating as personal data and have purged copies.
No customer crypto-asset balances moved; “SangoVault” relayer keys were revoked and non-public security-token pilot nodes were isolated from FDAEX connectivity.
Root cause points to a compromised contractor login for Ishiguro Rina-san (outsourced IT), account u.ishiguro+prj@kawatori-nexus.example.jp, via reused NekoDrive SSO token.
Immediate actions: rotate SSO secrets, invalidate VPN certs, patch jump boxes, and notify DPT ops; do not forward deal decks outside the ring-fenced folder.
Contact for this incident: Mr. Tadashi Mori-san, CISO, security@kawatori-nexus.example.jp, https://intra.kawatori-nexus.example.jp/ir?doc=PR0J-SUM1RE&tok=7d3%2F%2F.
We will consider voluntary 報告 to the local exchange’s cyber desk within 24h, and assess whether a corrective press release is required if the tender schedule changes under FIEA Article 167 guidance.
At this time, no material adverse change has occurred and no MAC clause is invoked in the GreenArc financing; public TCFD benchmarks cited were drawn from open sources.
Our ESG newsletter explains insider lists, information barriers, and selective disclosure risks; it is educational content and not a disclosure of any transaction.
marketing will host a webinar on “crypto custody resilience” using sanitized logs only; no mention of Project SUMIRE, tender-offer facts, or commercial terms will be included.
